title: Making Coco: The Grant Fuhr Story
original_title: Making Coco: The Grant Fuhr Story
overview: Grant Fuhr was the first black superstar in hockey. He won 403 regular season NHL games and is a member of the 2003 class of the Hockey Hall of Fame. Making Coco is the story of Fuhr's life, on and off the ice.
